first.detail: Show the shortest number of steps from the Demon to a Minion.
They choose a player; show one good and one evil character, one of which is correct.

other.detail: They choose a player; show one good and one evil character, one of which is correct.

first.detail: They choose a player. If it is the Demon, swap their characters and alignments, wake both players with their new information, and poison the new Snake Charmer.

other.detail: They choose a player. If it is the Demon, swap their characters and alignments, wake both players with their new information, and poison the new Snake Charmer.

first.detail: Show how many players' abilities malfunctioned due to another ability since dawn.

other.detail: Show how many players' abilities malfunctioned due to another ability since dawn.
Nod or shake your head for whether a Demon voted today.
Nod or shake your head for whether a Minion nominated today.
Show the number of dead evil players.

first.action: Wake the Seamstress if they have not used their ability.
first.detail: They may choose two other players; indicate whether those players have the same alignment.

other.action: Wake the Seamstress if they have not used their ability.
other.detail: They may choose two other players; indicate whether those players have the same alignment.

first.action: Wake the Philosopher if they have not used their ability.
first.detail: They may choose a good character ability to gain; make that character drunk if it is in play.

other.action: Wake the Philosopher if they have not used their ability.
other.detail: They may choose a good character ability to gain; make that character drunk if it is in play.

other.action: Wake the Juggler after their first day.
other.detail: Show the number of correct character guesses they made today.

other.action: Wake the Sage if a Demon killed them tonight.
other.detail: Point to two players, one of whom is the Demon that killed them.

other.action: Resolve the Sweetheart without waking them.
other.detail: If the Sweetheart died, choose a player to make drunk.

other.action: If the Barber died today, wake the Demon.
other.detail: Show the Barber token. The Demon may choose two players whose characters are swapped; wake both players and show their new characters.

first.action: Wake the Evil Twin and their good twin together.
first.detail: Show each twin the other player and the other's character.
They choose a player, who dies if they nominate tomorrow.

other.action: If at least four players are alive, wake the Witch.
other.detail: They choose a player, who dies if they nominate tomorrow.

first.detail: They choose a player and a good character; wake that player and show the Cerenovus token and chosen character.

other.detail: They choose a player and a good character; wake that player and show the Cerenovus token and chosen character.
They choose a player and character. If that character is not in play, change the chosen player's character and wake them to show it.
They choose a player, who dies. The first chosen Outsider instead becomes an evil Fang Gu; kill the old Fang Gu and wake the new one with their character and alignment.
They choose a player, who dies. A Minion killed this way keeps their ability and poisons a neighboring Townsfolk.
They choose a player, who dies.
They choose a player, who dies.
